# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: {{ env 'COMPUTER_NAME' }}
    type: Compute@1/api/v1/projects/{{ project }}/regions/{{ location }}/networks
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: ${subnets}
    type: Compute@1/api/v1/projects/${project}/regions/${location}/subnetworks
    properties:
      ipCidrRange: $(gcp.ip-address range ${cidr-range})

  - name: db-subnet
    type: Compute@1/api/v1/projects/${project}/regions/${location}/subnetworks
    properties:
      region: {{ location }}
      network: ${VPC-NETWORK}
      ipCidrRange: $(gcp.ip-address range 10.128.0.0/22)
